name: query-byosi
bodyMarkdown:
# BYOSI Scripting Interpreter Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1059.006, T1059.007 | **Log Sources:** Sysmon EID 1

```kql
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where FileName in ("python.exe", "python3.exe", "php.exe", "node.exe", "ruby.exe", "perl.exe", "lua.exe", "deno.exe", "bun.exe", "AutoHotkey.exe")
| where FolderPath has_any ("Temp", "tmp", "Downloads", "AppData", "Users\\Public", "Windows\\Temp")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (".py", ".php", ".js", "-e ", "-c ", "--eval", "-exec", "-r ")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
